questions.question: Which best captures the difference between alignment and AI control?
options: Alignment asks whether U is trustworthy; control asks whether we can safely use U without trusting it
Control replaces the loss function while alignment changes the optimizer
They are synonyms
Control is about hardware; alignment is about software
questions.question_zh: 下列哪一项最能概括 alignment 与 AI control 的区别？
options_zh: alignment 问的是 U 是否可信；control 问的是即使不信任 U，我们能否安全地使用它
control 替换 loss function，alignment 则改变 optimizer
二者是同义词
control 关心硬件，alignment 关心软件

questions.question: What does the AI Control threat model assume?
options: U is untrusted strong, T is trusted weak, H is bounded trusted human labor
U and T are both adversarial
All three resources (U, T, H) are trusted
Only U exists
questions.question_zh: AI Control 的威胁模型有哪些假设？
options_zh: U 是 untrusted strong，T 是 trusted weak，H 是有限可信的人工劳力
U 与 T 都是 adversarial
三种资源 (U、T、H) 都是 trusted
只存在 U

questions.question: What is the key risk in Untrusted Monitoring that Trusted Editing avoids?
options: Two instances of U can collude or share priors, so the protocol must spend budget on collusion-resistance
Humans cannot be audited
Hardware contention
T cannot edit text
questions.question_zh: Untrusted Monitoring 中存在、而 Trusted Editing 能规避的关键风险是什么？
options_zh: 两个 U 实例可能 collude 或共享先验，所以协议必须分配预算来抵抗共谋
人类无法被审计
硬件资源争用
T 无法编辑文本

questions.question: On the Greenblatt et al. (ICML 2024) code-backdoor task, what does Trusted Editing achieve relative to Untrusted Monitoring?
options: It is strictly worse
It only wins at zero human budget
They are exactly equivalent
It strictly Pareto-dominates: higher usefulness at every safety level
questions.question_zh: 在 Greenblatt 等人 (ICML 2024) 的 code-backdoor 任务上，Trusted Editing 相对于 Untrusted Monitoring 取得了什么结果？
options_zh: 严格更差
只在 human budget 为零时领先
二者完全等价
它实现了严格的 Pareto 占优：在每个 safety 等级上 usefulness 都更高

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT one of the lesson's three fundamental limits of control?
options: Trusted weak models eventually lag U
Control produces aligned models as a byproduct
Humans do not scale
Control may fail at higher capability levels if U can manipulate T or reason about H's audit distribution
questions.question_zh: 下列哪一项不属于本课列出的 control 三大根本性局限？
options_zh: trusted weak 模型最终会落后于 U
control 会作为副产品产出 aligned 模型
人类无法 scale
在更高 capability 等级上，如果 U 能操纵 T 或推断 H 的审计分布，control 可能失效

questions.question: What does a Control Safety Case argue?
options: That T is more capable than U
That under worst-case assumptions about U, the deployment protocol bounds the probability of an unacceptable outcome
That U is trustworthy
That the model passed a manual jailbreak test
questions.question_zh: Control Safety Case 在论证什么？
options_zh: T 比 U 更有能力
在对 U 的 worst-case 假设下，部署协议能把不可接受结果的概率限定在某个上界以内
U 是值得信赖的
模型通过了一次手工 jailbreak 测试
